method.name: Generative Adversarial NAS (GA-NAS)
method.description: A provably converging and efficient search algorithm for Neural Architecture Search based on adversarial learning
method.inspiration: Cross Entropy (CE) method in importance sampling

components.architecture_generator: RNN and GNN-based network trained using RL
components.discriminator: Distinguishes winning architectures from randomly generated ones

method.key_innovation: Uses discriminator rewards instead of evaluating generated architectures directly
method.theoretical_foundation: Connects GA-NAS to importance sampling method with symmetric Jensen-Shannon (JS) divergence loss
method.convergence_property: Proven to converge in a finite number of steps

results.performance: Outperforms existing NAS algorithms including EA, RL, BO, DARTS
